honors.zh: 2020年天津大学优秀学生干部；2021年社团活动先进个人
honors.en: Excellent Student Leader at Tianjin University 2020; Advanced Participant in University Associations 2021

campusRoles.zh: 天外天工作室产品组组长；天津大学网络安全协会部长
campusRoles.en: Product Lead at TWT Studio; Minister at TJU Cyber Security Association

zh: 负责 Azure Entra ID 身份认证范围内的技术支持，覆盖账号与设备管理、条件访问、Identity Protection、企业应用集成部署，以及本地联合身份服务 ADFS 等场景。
支持 Graph API 与 PowerShell Graph Module 的问题排查与方案落地，熟悉 OAuth 2.0、OIDC、SAML 等认证协议。
基于用户问题收集诊断信息、定位根因并输出可执行解决方案，参与团队诊断工具建设与技术知识 RAG 模型优化，提升问题闭环效率与客户满意度。
en: Responsible for technical support within the Azure Entra ID authentication scope, covering account and device management, Conditional Access, Identity Protection, enterprise application integration and deployment, and on-premises federation services such as ADFS.
Provided troubleshooting support for Graph API and PowerShell Graph Module, with hands-on knowledge of OAuth 2.0, OIDC, and SAML authentication protocols.

Collected diagnostics, identified root causes, and delivered practical solutions for customer issues while contributing to internal diagnostic tooling and a RAG knowledge model for technical documentation.

zh: 在自动新闻评论项目中，以提升用户互动率和优化舆情管理为目标，构建了一个能够自动生成带有情感倾向评论的新闻评论生成系统。
基于腾讯快报新闻评论数据构建训练集，并使用 PaddleHub 的 senta-bow 模型进行情感标注；随后微调 Hugging Face 上的 Mengzi-T5 模型，累计处理约 16 万条数据。
持续优化生成策略，提升娱乐和体育新闻场景下评论的连贯性与情绪准确度，最终完成可在线访问的评论生成模型。
en: In the Automated News Commenting project, built a system that generates emotionally aligned news comments to improve user engagement and support public opinion operations.

Constructed training sets using Tencent Kuai-bao news and comment data, performed sentiment labeling with PaddleHub's senta-bow model, and fine-tuned the Mengzi-T5 model from Hugging Face with about 160,000 data samples.
Iteratively optimized the generation strategy to improve fluency, coherence, and sentiment accuracy for entertainment and sports news scenarios.

zh: 面向游乐园用户动线与历史数据分析场景，开发了一套实时数据可视化平台。
使用 Python 完成数据清洗与趋势预测，前端采用 HTML、CSS、JavaScript 与 Bootstrap，后端使用 Node.js 和 Express，数据库为 PostgreSQL 16。
平台覆盖实时大屏、动态图表、工作日志同步和历史数据分析等核心能力。
en: Implemented a visualization platform for processing real-time amusement park user movement data and analyzing historical trends.
Used Python for data cleaning and forecasting, built the frontend with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap, developed backend APIs with Node.js and Express, and used PostgreSQL 16 as the database.
Delivered a platform with real-time dashboards, dynamic charts, synchronized work logs, and historical analysis features.

zh: 与团队协作完成基于树莓派的语音交互系统，系统包含语音识别、语音合成、问答和自然语言对话能力。
负责将模型回复转化为语音输出，使用 Tacotron2 模型完成 TTS 模块训练与调优。
参与分词、韵律标注、模型参数微调，以及 ASR、问答、TTS 模块在树莓派端的联调集成。
en: Collaborated on a Raspberry Pi-based voice interaction system featuring ASR, TTS, Q&A, and NLP dialogue.
Focused on converting model responses into speech using the Tacotron2 model for the TTS module.
Handled preprocessing tasks such as word segmentation and prosody labeling, fine-tuned parameters, and participated in end-to-end integration on the Raspberry Pi device.

name.zh: 地理知识图谱查询平台

zh: 基于 Neo4j 图数据库设计地理知识查询平台，实现节点查询、动态地图展示和坐标信息联动。
使用网络爬虫采集地理知识文本，并进行结构化整理。
前端采用 Vue 与 ElementUI，结合 neovis.js 完成图谱渲染，并通过百度地图 API 集成动态地图功能。
en: Designed a geographic knowledge query platform based on the Neo4j graph database, featuring node queries, dynamic maps, and coordinate display.
Used web crawlers to gather and structure geographic knowledge text.
Built the frontend with Vue and ElementUI, rendered graph data with neovis.js, and integrated map functionality with the Baidu Maps API.

zh: 使用 Neo4j、Angular 和 Flask 搭建本地图书排行知识图谱，支持节点分类、关系检索和已读书单管理。
完成图谱前后端联调，并实现面向本地图书主题的知识检索流程。
在第二阶段基于红军长征数据集完成问答系统实验，结合课程指导与开源项目进行功能实现。
en: Built a local book-ranking knowledge graph with Neo4j, Angular, and Flask, including node classification, relationship search, and a read-books library.
Completed frontend-backend integration and implemented a knowledge retrieval workflow around book-related entities.
In the second phase, finished a Q&A experiment based on the Red Army Long March dataset using course guidance and open-source references.

zh: 负责校友之家小程序及管理后台从需求分析到上线交付的全流程，并协调校内客户与第三方资源推进项目。
围绕在校生、教师和校友场景设计了场地预订、文创商城、留言板、资讯公告等核心功能，并在后台支持预订管理、留言审核和用户反馈处理。
引入有赞交易能力后，小程序累计服务 5k+ 用户，增强了校友与学校之间的连接。
en: Owned the full lifecycle of the alumni mini-program and management backend, from requirements analysis to launch, while coordinating with campus stakeholders and third-party partners.

Designed features such as room booking, merchandise shopping, guestbooks, and news announcements for students, faculty, and alumni, with supporting backend workflows for bookings, moderation, and feedback.
Integrated Youzan for transaction flows and helped the mini-program reach 5k+ users, strengthening the bond between alumni and the university.

zh: 负责微北洋 4.0 从需求、上线到运营迭代的完整流程，这是一款集课表、成绩、空教室查询和论坛功能于一体的校园应用。
主导论坛模块迭代以及整体 UI 和功能升级，推动自定义课表、考试日历、节日皮肤等新功能上线。
项目最高单日 PV 达 3w+、UV 达 1w+，论坛与校园事务板块成为用户高频使用入口。
en: Managed the full lifecycle from requirements to launch and iteration for WePeiyang 4.0, a campus app integrating schedules, GPA, study room lookup, and forums.
Led the forum iteration and the overall UI and functionality refresh, shipping features such as custom schedules, exam calendars, and seasonal skins.
Reached 30k+ peak daily PV and 10k+ UV, with the forum and campus affairs sections becoming highly active user destinations.

name.zh: 天外天工作室 2020 招新 H5

zh: 为工作室招新，与 8 位开发和设计同学协作，打造了一个以“天大冒险新手村”为主题的互动式招新 H5。
采用明亮像素风视觉与角色选择、场景探索、人物对话等交互机制，让用户在轻量剧情中了解产品、设计、开发等不同组别的工作内容。
最终将团队文化介绍与报名转化自然串联，帮助意向同学快速找到适合自己的方向。
en: Collaborated with eight developers and designers to create an interactive recruitment H5 themed around a 'TJU Adventure Novice Village.'
Used a bright pixel-art style and interactions such as character selection, scene exploration, and dialogue with animated team avatars to introduce Product, Design, and Dev groups.
Connected studio culture storytelling with recruitment conversion, helping interested students quickly identify their preferred direction.

zh: 负责天外天招新中心从需求分析、原型设计到项目管理的全流程，面向全校组织统一提供招新工具。
系统包含学生浏览与报名的客户端，以及组织方创建问卷、管理报名信息、记录面试和自动发送短信通知的管理端。
项目有效简化了校园社团和组织的招新流程，也统一了学生侧的报名体验。
en: Handled the entire process from requirements analysis and prototyping to project management for the Recruitment Center, a platform serving campus organizations.
The system included an applicant-facing client and an admin side for questionnaire creation, applicant management, interview records, and automated SMS notifications.
It streamlined recruitment for campus clubs and organizations while creating a more unified application experience for students.
